fixesApplied.description: Removed non-existent 'AccountingPeriodController' from controllers list. Period endpoints are all in AccountingController.
fixesApplied.fix: Consolidated controller list to only list AccountingController with full period lifecycle scope.

fixesApplied.description: Cross-module boundary incorrectly stated 'PayrollPostingService → AccountingCoreEngineCore'. Source code shows PayrollPostingService uses AccountingFacade.
Posted-truth rules (reversal vs editing boundaries) required by VAL-FIN-001 were not explicit.
fixesApplied.fix: Added explicit Posted-Truth Rules section documenting period-state-dependent reversal rules, correction types, period-lock enforcement, and compliance audit requirements — all verified against AccountingCoreEngineCore source.

nonBlockingIssues.description: JournalCreationRequest DTO description could be more precise — the actual DTO shape differs from the description which mixes JournalCreationRequest and JournalEntryRequest fields.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a verification step for code-grounding accuracy: workers should cross-check controller names against actual source files and verify cross-module dependency paths by inspecting import statements before claiming documentation is complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: docs-finance-accounting-core worker handoff claimed 'already satisfies VAL-FIN-001 requirements' but the document listed a non-existent controller (AccountingPeriodController) and misstated a cross-module dependency path (PayrollPostingService → AccountingCoreEngineCore instead of AccountingFacade).

rejectedObservations.observation: Relative paths in AGENTS.md are extremely deep and brittle
rejectedObservations.reason: This is the existing convention for module-level AGENTS.md files; changing it is a style preference, not a factual error. The paths work correctly.
